title: Food intake behavior protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9pjc8","text":"This protocol describes the behavioral test to measure food intake in mice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Habituate mice in single cages 2 days prior the test day.
Fast the mice for 18 hours with access to water.
Using a small weight scale measure food chow and allow ad libitum food intake.
Record food chow weight at 1, 2-, 4-, 6-, and 24-hours post-food chow access.
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
